get.description: End session of the current user

parameters.name: logout
parameters.description: Set to some value to log out the current user

301.description: Redirect with the logout parameter set.

post.description: Start an authenticated session for the given user

get.summary: Retrieve items with pagination and search
get.description: Returns a paginated list of items in HTML format. Optionally, a search term can be provided.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search term to search for.

parameters.name: search-type
parameters.description:
Search types: 
 - `1`: search texts
 - `2`: search dictionary
 - `3`: search translations
 - `4`: search everyting
 - `5` search only one text
 - `6`: search translated lines
 - `7`: search titles
 - `8`: tabulate search results by text
 - `9`: advanced search
 - `10`: search bibliography
 - `11`: search notes
 - `12`: display list of texts

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description:
Sort modes : 
 - `date`: order by text date (ascending)
 - `date-desc`: order by text date (descending)
 - `rating`: order by text rating

parameters.name: textid
parameters.description: The textid of the requested text.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: The filter category to be applied.

200.description: A successful response with HTML content.

schema.example:
Items

List of items filtered by search term...

get.summary: Count the hits in a search
get.description: Returns an HTML fragment with the item count. For compatibility, the same parameters as in search are allowed, all except query will be ignored.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The search term to search for.

parameters.name: search-type
parameters.description:
Search types: 
 - `1`: search texts
 - `2`: search dictionary
 - `3`: search translations
 - `4`: search everyting
 - `5` search only one text
 - `6`: search translated lines
 - `7`: search titles
 - `8`: tabulate search results by text
 - `9`: advanced search
 - `10`: search bibliography
 - `11`: search notes
 - `12`: display list of texts

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description:
Sort modes : 
 - `date`: order by text date (ascending)
 - `date-desc`: order by text date (descending)
 - `rating`: order by text rating

parameters.name: textid
parameters.description: The textid of the requested text.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: The filter category to be applied.

200.description: A successful response with HTML content.
